'''Jungle worrts''' were [[Amphibion|amphibious]] creatures found on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. [[Jungle/Legends|Jungle]] worrts used their long [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Tongue/Legends|tongues]] to catch smaller [[Diet/Legends|prey]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''

}}
